name: Banana Bread French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour the bottom of a 9-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all bread ingredients. Stir until dry particles are moistened (about 50-75 strokes).
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 40-50 minutes or until done.
5. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely.
6. Cut bread into 12 slices.
7. Preheat a skillet to 375°F and grease lightly with margarine.
8. In a pie dish, combine eggs, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
9. Dip bread slices in egg mixture, turning to coat both sides well.
10. Cook in the skillet for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
11. Serve with syrup.
